description: A spin off from the classic formal shoe, this pair of flats from catwalk is designed to charm you out of your staple stilettos. Add a new-season lift to your ensembles with this patent-toed pair. Tap into the mood of the moment - the androgynous - with these flats. Work the look with a formal shirt from arrow and tailored pants.UpperSynthetic leather upper with patent leather overlay on the toe boxStitch detailing for good shoe structureFabric lining with mildly padded sockliner for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with upraised heel Herringbone patterned grooves for gripShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
